title: Paid Network - REKT
relevance_summary: Infinite mint followed by large token dump on Uniswap

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints a large amount of tokens and then immediately dumps them on a decentralized exchange.

red_flags: Large mint followed by immediate dumping on DEX
Ownership transfer shortly before mint event
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints a large amount of tokens and then immediately dumps them on a decentralized exchange.
summary: The attacker exploited an infinite mint feature to create a large number of tokens and then dumped them on Uniswap, causing a significant price drop. A guard could have detected this by blocking any transaction that mints a large amount of tokens and then immediately dumps them on a decentralized exchange.
